title: The Road to the Final Island
description: On pages 8–11, the road to the final island as luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line.
scene: The Road to the Final Island. Luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then does that mean...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: One piece is on that island!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: who knows.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Although that is the most likely theory, nobody has ever reached there to confirm it.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: enough thinking.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We can see for ourselves once we're there!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ahhh... should we get going now?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm finished eating and all.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Did you just eat everything all by yourself!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Aghhh! Even the bones are gone!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alright, log pose... I'll make sure to take good care of you. The fate of our journey is all up to you, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why you rubber crap head! that food was... was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For Nami to Enjoy!

dialogue.speaker: Crocus
dialogue.text: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You two can just go cool your heads down in the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: BUGAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Wasn't that compass, like, super-duper important!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What do we do, CroCus!? Our precious log pose is....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: don't worry. I'll give you one as a sign of thanks for the matter with Laboon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well? Can you see them, Mr.9?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...I can't really make out what exactly happened just now but...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I think that woman has our log pose.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could you have been so careless to accidentally drop our precious log pose!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I sincerely apologize for my EHR, Miss Wednesday. I know well that we can't return back to our town without it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're already long overdue in our mission to catch the whale.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If we don't hurry back and report to the boss, we'll be in some serious trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We've lost our weapons but we have no choice but to take it back by force. We can't just stand around waiting for the perfect chance any longer.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the road to the final island. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
